settings.privacy_text:
**PRIVACY POLICY AND CLARIFICATION TEXT**

This application ("Wake Me at the Stop") processes your personal data only for the nature of the service, in accordance with the Law on the Protection of Personal Data No. 6698 ("KVKK").

1. What Data is Collected?
* Location Data: Used to calculate how close you are to the alarm stop. This data is not sent to our servers, it is processed only within your phone.
* Background Location: Accessed in the background so the alarm can ring when the app is closed or the screen is locked.

2. Where is Data Stored?
All data (alarm list, settings) is stored encrypted on your own device. It is not backed up on cloud servers.

3. Sharing with Third Parties
Your personal data is not shared with third parties for advertising or analysis purposes. Queries are sent anonymously to map services (Nominatim/Photon) only for address search operations.

4. Your Rights
You can instantly destroy all your data by deleting the application.

permissions.background_desc: For the alarm to work in your pocket or on lock screen, you must select 'Allow all the time' for location permission.
